subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Quds 6
subcodes.first_line: This is the Tablet of holiness; We have expounded it from the Mother Book and sent it unto the one who hath believed in the Lord his God
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح القدس قد فصلناه من ام البیان و ارسلناه الی من آمن بالله ربه الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
